title: TextEditingControllers not disposed in ChatScreen and SetupScreen
description: ChatScreen creates _inputController, _scrollController (actually ScrollController), and _relayUrlController but never calls dispose() on them. SetupScreen creates _seedHexController without disposing it. Flutter requires controllers to be disposed in State.dispose() to release resources and unregister listeners. When these screens are popped, controllers leak. Fix: override dispose() in both State classes and call .dispose() on each controller.
